issues: light-bg contrast slightly soft for gold mid-tones
reasoning: Golden key has genuine toy charm: round decorative head with colourful gem (pink/green/blue), warm fantasy-RPG palette, clean pixel outlines. Silhouette reads unambiguously as a key at 1x — bow ring + shaft + teeth are all distinguishable despite tiny size. On dark/black bg, golden orange pops nicely and personality is clear. On cream bg the gold still reads but feels slightly flat without strong dark outline anchor. Main weakness: the colourful gem and bow detail collapse to indistinct noise at 1x, so the charm payload only arrives at 4x. Passes sticker test at 4x — cute, friendly, instantly legible. Falls just short of clean pass due to 1x detail loss and marginal light-bg punch.
